Ntc Of Mtn & Mtn For Order That Matters In Deft'S Request For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted & Imposing Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-22-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendants' Motion For Order That Matters In Defendant's Request For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted is granted. No opposition has been filed. Sanctions are imposed against Plaintiff in the amount of $921.30, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Ntc Of Mtn & Mtn To Compel Pltf'S Responses, Compel Production Of Documents, Impose Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-22-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendants' Motion To Compel Plaintiff's Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set One; Special Interrogatories, Set One; and Request For Production of Documents, Set One; Production of Documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Plaintiff is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $921.30, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
